title: brachyscome tatei
intro: Brachyscome tatei, also known as the Australian daisy or native daisy, is a flowering plant native to the eastern coast of Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever and alleviate cold symptoms. The health benefits of Brachyscome tatei include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. Brachyscome tatei can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tea, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
